headline: Keysight Launches SBOM Manager to Help Organizations Prepare for Emerging Global Cybersecurity Regulations
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 18, 2026--New solution streamlines SBOM generation, vulnerability intelligence, and secure sharing to support compliance with the EU Cyber Resilience Act.
